userMessage: see what you can find i nthe tekscopePC app using offline waveform on Ref1

response.text: Done — the offline Ref1 eye-diagram view shows a ~1.106 Gb/s signal with period ~1.066 ns, UI 40 samples, eye width ~345.9 ps, total jitter ~54.07 ps, deterministic jitter ~33.75 ps, random jitter ~1.680 ps, periodic jitter ~1.316 ps, DCD ~2.288 ps, DDJ ~32.44 ps, and TIE σ ~8.681 ps; the eye is fairly open, the TIE histogram is centered near 0 ps with some left-tail outliers, and the TIE spectrum has discrete spurs indicating periodic components rather than purely random noise.
